meta.title: Amanak: Your Medical Journey in Egypt
meta.description: Trusted healthcare in Egypt’s leading hospitals for our patients from the Middle East. A safe medical journey with clear costs.

h1.description: Multi-specialty center with modern ORs and dedicated international patient services.

h2.description: Focused orthopedics and oncology programs with an international consultant team.

h3.description: Full IVF pathways and nursing staff fluent in several languages.

treatments.pageLead: Explore the pathways we coordinate in Egypt.. from the first review to travel and follow-up.

diabetic_foot.title: Diabetic Foot Care.. Limb Salvage
diabetic_foot.description: We use modern techniques for limb salvage and preventing amputation with success rates up to 98%.
diabetic_foot.doctors: Prof. Rashad Bishara, Prof. Ayman El Samadony, Dr. Hussein Alwan
diabetic_foot.hospitals: Egyptian Center for Diabetic Foot, Andalusia Hospitals
diabetic_foot.techniques: Peripheral Angioplasty, Vacuum Therapy (NPWT), Hyperbaric Oxygen (HBOT)
diabetic_foot.body:
Complex diabetic foot cases require immediate and comprehensive medical evaluation, including blood flow, infection control, and a precise wound care plan to avoid complications that may threaten the limb.

In Egypt, medical teams have extensive experience in dealing with joint disease and deep infection cases, using the latest imaging and revascularization techniques.

We help you share your medical records early and align on a realistic treatment plan, with clarification on stay duration, aftercare details, and follow-up with your doctor after return.

ivf.title: IVF & Fertility
ivf.description: Integrated programs to achieve the dream of motherhood with success rates matching the best global centers.
ivf.doctors: Prof. Mohamed Aboulghar, Prof. Maged Adel Aziz
ivf.hospitals: Bedaya Hospital, Sunrise Fertility Center, Egyptian IVF Center
ivf.techniques: No-Needle IVF, Genetic Screening (PGD/PGT), Gender Selection
ivf.body:
The success of IVF depends on precise medical protocols, reliable lab quality, and transparent planning for each stage, away from general marketing promises.

Egypt has long-standing experience in treating fertility diseases, where a customized treatment program is designed for each case based on age, ovarian reserve, and the couple's medical history.

We coordinate remote medical record review and clarify all details of the treatment stages, with full logistical support so you can focus on your medical journey calmly.

oncology.title: Oncology (Cancer Treatment)
oncology.description: Modern treatment protocols according to international standards (ESMO) with the latest immunotherapy and genetic treatments.
oncology.doctors: Prof. Tamer El Nahas, Prof. Hesham ElGhazaly, Dr. Ahmed Elashry
oncology.body:
Cancer patient care requires precise coordination between diagnosis, evaluation, and medical, radiation, and surgical treatments, relying on the most accurate analysis and imaging.

Medical centers in Egypt adopt the Tumor Boards system to ensure the best treatment plan for each patient according to international guidelines.

Amanak team focuses on preparing your medical file for consultation and providing a second medical opinion when needed, with travel plan organization that respects treatment dates and recovery periods.

joint_replacement.title: Hip Replacement Surgery
joint_replacement.description: Involves replacing the damaged hip joint with a prosthetic one to help patients walk comfortably and pain-free.
joint_replacement.doctors: Prof. Mahmoud Hafez, Prof. Fouad Zamel Sadek
joint_replacement.hospitals: Saudi German Hospital, Andalusia Hospitals, October 6 University
joint_replacement.body:
Joint replacement results depend on the surgeon's skill, the quality of joints used, and intensive physical therapy programs to ensure the best movement and fastest recovery.

Our comprehensive packages start from ~$5500 and include the operation, 1 day in the ICU, 4 days in a normal room, and postoperative follow-up.

We help you evaluate your case before travel and determine the required stay duration and physical therapy sessions, to ensure a successful and comfortable medical journey.

knee_replacement.title: Knee Replacement Surgery
knee_replacement.description: The damaged knee joint is replaced with an artificial implant to relieve pain and restore mobility.
knee_replacement.doctors: Prof. Mahmoud Hafez, Prof. Fouad Zamel Sadek
knee_replacement.hospitals: Saudi German Hospital, Andalusia Hospitals, October 6 University
knee_replacement.body: Ideal for patients with severe joint damage or advanced arthritis. Modern implants and minimally invasive techniques ensure a faster return to daily activities.

limb_lengthening.title: Limb Lengthening Surgery
limb_lengthening.description: A procedure designed to increase leg length by gradually stretching the bones.
limb_lengthening.doctors: Prof. Mahmoud Hafez, Prof. Mohamed Fawzy Khattab
limb_lengthening.body: Performed for medical reasons (such as correcting leg length discrepancies) or for cosmetic purposes to safely increase height using internal or external fixation devices.

spine_surgery.title: Spine Surgeries
spine_surgery.description: Includes procedures like spinal fusion, herniated disc removal, and scoliosis correction.
spine_surgery.hospitals: As-Salam International Hospital, Ain Shams University
spine_surgery.body: These surgeries relieve chronic back pain and improve spinal function using the latest surgical navigation and monitoring systems.

breast_augmentation.title: Breast Augmentation
breast_augmentation.description: This procedure enhances breast size and shape using either silicone implants or fat transfer.
breast_augmentation.doctors: Dr. Yasser Badi, Dr. Mohamed Abdallah Tawfik
breast_augmentation.hospitals: Specialized Aesthetic Centers in Cairo & Alexandria
breast_augmentation.body: Silicone Implants: Offer a long-lasting, natural, and attractive look. Fat Transfer: Fat is harvested from areas like the abdomen or thighs, purified, and then injected into the breasts to achieve a fuller and natural appearance.

bbl.title: Brazilian Butt Lift (BBL)
bbl.description: A cosmetic procedure that enhances the shape and volume of the buttocks by injecting fat taken from other body areas.
bbl.doctors: Dr. Yasser Badi, Dr. Mohamed Abdallah Tawfik
bbl.hospitals: Specialized Aesthetic Centers in Cairo & Alexandria
bbl.body: Advanced VASER liposuction is used to safely extract fat while minimizing bruising and swelling, achieving natural and defined results.

gynecomastia.title: Gynecomastia Surgery
gynecomastia.description: This surgery treats enlarged male breasts using a combination of liposuction, gland removal, and skin removal.
gynecomastia.doctors: Dr. Yasser Badi, Dr. Mohamed Abdallah Tawfik
gynecomastia.hospitals: Specialized Aesthetic Centers in Cairo & Alexandria
gynecomastia.body: VASER technology may be used for more precise results and chest contouring. This surgery treats enlarged male breasts using a combination of liposuction, gland removal, and, in severe cases, excess skin removal.

vaser_liposuction.title: VASER Liposuction Technology
vaser_liposuction.description: Advanced liposuction technique using ultrasound waves to break down fat before removal.
vaser_liposuction.doctors: Dr. Yasser Badi, Dr. Mohamed Abdallah Tawfik
vaser_liposuction.hospitals: Specialized Aesthetic Centers in Cairo & Alexandria
vaser_liposuction.body: This advanced liposuction technique uses ultrasound waves to break down fat before removal, making the procedure less invasive. It helps reduce swelling and bruising compared to traditional methods. The procedure depends on the patient's condition and targeted areas. It is considered safe and effective for achieving natural and outstanding results.

addiction.title: Addiction Treatment.. Private & Confidential
addiction.description: Integrated rehabilitation programs in a calm environment providing maximum comfort and confidentiality.
addiction.body:
Effective addiction treatment combines precise medical assessment and evidence-based behavioral therapy, with a continuous follow-up plan after return.

We place the highest importance on privacy and psychological comfort for the patient and their family, with clarification of all treatment program details and communication channels from the start.

Amanak team ensures respectful coordination that considers total confidentiality and comfortable logistics, for a safe and successful change journey.

cosmetic.title: Cosmetic & Body Contouring
cosmetic.description: The latest body contouring (VASER) and advanced hair transplantation techniques.
cosmetic.doctors: Dr. Yasser Badi, Dr. Mohamed Abdallah Tawfik
cosmetic.hospitals: Specialized Aesthetic Centers in Cairo & Alexandria
cosmetic.body:
Aesthetic surgery requires precise case evaluation and realistic planning for results and recovery period, to ensure obtaining the desired appearance with total safety.

Specialists in Egypt are characterized by high skill in rhinoplasty, body contouring, and facial rejuvenation operations, using the latest global technologies.

We support you in arranging medical consultations, clarifying required tests, and coordinating travel dates to suit the treatment and follow-up plan.

dental.title: Dental Treatment
dental.description: Implants, smile design, and full-mouth rehabilitation with modern materials and clear timelines.
dental.doctors: Dr. John Elia, Dr. Ahmed Saeed
dental.hospitals: Dental Express Center, Wonders Dentistry Center
dental.body:
Dental travel plans need accurate imaging, treatment sequencing, and infection control standards. We coordinate your records, specialist selection, and visit schedule so you know how long to stay and what to expect at each step.

Our dental implant packages start from ~$40 and include the implant along with free teeth extraction, cleaning, and polishing.

hair_transplant.title: Hair Transplant
hair_transplant.description: FUE and advanced graft techniques for natural density and natural hairlines.
hair_transplant.doctors: Dr. Shady El-Maghraby, Dr. Marwan Noureldin
hair_transplant.body:
Hair restoration outcomes depend on donor quality, graft planning, and aftercare. We help you share photos and medical history for a realistic assessment before you travel.

Our packages start at ~$200 and include examination, the operation, hospital fees, medication, aftercare treatment, and 4 PRP sessions.

plastic_surgery.title: Plastic Surgery
plastic_surgery.description: Facial and body procedures planned with board-certified surgeons and clear recovery timelines.
plastic_surgery.doctors: Dr. Yasser Badi, Dr. Mohamed Abdallah Tawfik
plastic_surgery.hospitals: Specialized Aesthetic Centers in Cairo & Alexandria
plastic_surgery.body:
Elective surgery abroad should start with candidacy review, not marketing promises. We organize remote consultation materials and match you to surgeons whose scope fits your goals.

For example, our Tummy Tuck packages start at ~$700 and include a one-night hospital stay, doctor fees, and postoperative follow-up.

cardiology.title: Cardiology
cardiology.description: Diagnostics, catheter procedures, and heart surgery pathways coordinated with accredited hospitals.
cardiology.doctors: Prof. Ahmed Rezk, Prof. Mohamed Al-Ghannam, Prof. Hossam Fathi
cardiology.hospitals: Dar Al Fouad, Ain Shams University Hospitals, As-Salam International
cardiology.techniques: Beating Heart CABG, Minimally Invasive Valve Repair
cardiology.body:
Cardiac care requires structured diagnostics (ECG, echocardiography, imaging) and clear escalation when intervention is needed. We help assemble your history and prior tests for a focused second opinion.

For travelers, we plan logistics around stress tests, cath lab slots, and required observation periods so your itinerary matches clinical safety.

neurology.title: Neurology
neurology.description: Evaluation and treatment for stroke risk, epilepsy, movement disorders, and complex headache.
neurology.doctors: Prof. Magd Zakaria, Prof. Ahmed ElBassiouny, Dr. Walid Elhalaby
neurology.hospitals: Ain Shams Specialized Hospital, Cairo University Hospitals
neurology.body:
Neurological complaints often need imaging and sometimes longitudinal assessment. We coordinate record translation, appointment sequencing, and any required inpatient observation.

Our hospital partners provide modern MRI/CT access and multidisciplinary review when surgery or device therapy is on the table.

eye_surgery.title: Eye Surgery
eye_surgery.description: Cataract, refractive (LASIK/SMILE), and selected retinal or oculoplastic procedures.
eye_surgery.doctors: Prof. Ahmad Khalil, Prof. Hazem Helmy
eye_surgery.hospitals: Research Institute of Ophthalmology, International Eye Hospital
eye_surgery.success_rate: Pioneering Eye Surgeons in the Middle East
eye_surgery.body:
Ophthalmic surgery depends on precise measurements and dry-eye screening. We help you complete pre-op tests locally or on arrival to avoid surprises.

Egypt’s eye hospitals combine JCI-accredited pathways with experienced consultants; we align your stay with post-op review dates before you fly home.

bariatric.title: Bariatric Surgery
bariatric.description: Weight-loss surgery with multidisciplinary assessment, nutrition, and follow-up planning.
bariatric.doctors: Prof. Mahmoud Zakaria, Dr. Tamer Abdelbaki
bariatric.techniques: Bikini Sleeve, Gastric Bypass, Smart Capsule
bariatric.body:
Bariatric programs should include psychological readiness, nutrition counseling, and long-term vitamin monitoring, not only the operation day. We coordinate the screening checklist and hospital eligibility criteria upfront.

Sleeve gastrectomy and gastric bypass require staged recovery; we build your travel window around surgeon protocols and first follow-up visits.

fue_extraction.title: FUE - Follicular Unit Extraction
fue_extraction.description: Individual follicle extraction with minimal scarring and fast recovery for mild to moderate hair loss.
fue_extraction.doctors: Dr. Shady El-Maghraby, Dr. Marwan Noureldin
fue_extraction.body:
FUE extracts individual follicles from the donor area and places them in thinning zones with precise angling for natural density. It is less invasive than strip techniques and suits many travel-friendly treatment plans.

Starting package price aligns with Clinido source pricing from 30,000 EGP (about $600).

fut_transplantation.title: FUE - Follicular Unit Transplantation
fut_transplantation.description: Strip-based graft harvesting for cases that need a high graft count in one session.
fut_transplantation.doctors: Dr. Shady El-Maghraby, Dr. Marwan Noureldin
fut_transplantation.body:
FUT removes a thin donor strip, separates it into graft units, and implants the grafts in target areas. It is typically selected when a larger number of grafts is needed in one sitting.

Starting package price aligns with Clinido source pricing from 10,000 EGP (about $200).

dhi_implantation.title: DHI (Direct Hair Implantation)
dhi_implantation.description: Direct implantation using a Choi pen for precise angle and direction control.
dhi_implantation.doctors: Dr. Shady El-Maghraby, Dr. Marwan Noureldin
dhi_implantation.body:
DHI implants follicles directly without opening broad channels first, which gives surgeons tighter control over placement design. This technique is often chosen for dense hairline work and natural visual outcomes.

Starting package price aligns with Clinido source pricing from 25,000 EGP (about $500).

robotic_hair_transplant.title: Robotic Hair Transplant (ARTAS)
robotic_hair_transplant.description: AI-assisted follicle extraction and implantation for high precision and consistency.
robotic_hair_transplant.doctors: Dr. Shady El-Maghraby, Dr. Marwan Noureldin
robotic_hair_transplant.body:
Robotic systems support graft extraction mapping and implantation planning to improve speed and precision in selected candidates. The approach is suitable for patients prioritizing advanced technology pathways.

Starting package price aligns with Clinido source pricing from 80,000 EGP (about $1,600).

conventional_ivf.title: Conventional IVF
conventional_ivf.description: Egg and sperm fertilization in the lab followed by embryo transfer.
conventional_ivf.doctors: Prof. Mohamed Aboulghar, Prof. Maged Adel Aziz
conventional_ivf.hospitals: Bedaya Hospital, Sunrise Fertility Center, Egyptian IVF Center
conventional_ivf.body:
Conventional IVF combines eggs and sperm in a controlled lab environment and transfers selected embryos to the uterus. It remains the most common fertility pathway for many indications.

Starting package price aligns with Clinido source pricing from 30,000 EGP (about $600).

icsi.title: ICSI (Intracytoplasmic Sperm Injection)
icsi.description: Single sperm injection into an egg for male-factor infertility and complex cases.
icsi.doctors: Prof. Mohamed Aboulghar, Prof. Maged Adel Aziz
icsi.hospitals: Bedaya Hospital, Sunrise Fertility Center, Egyptian IVF Center
icsi.body:
ICSI injects one selected sperm into each mature egg, then transfers resulting embryos according to medical protocol. It is commonly used in low sperm quality and prior IVF-failure scenarios.

Starting package price aligns with Clinido source pricing from 30,000 EGP (about $600).

hip_replacement.title: Hip Replacement Surgery
hip_replacement.description: Replacement of damaged hip joints to restore movement and reduce severe pain.
hip_replacement.doctors: Prof. Mahmoud Hafez, Prof. Fouad Zamel Sadek
hip_replacement.hospitals: Dar Al Fouad Hospital, Andalusia Al Maadi Hospital
hip_replacement.body:
Hip replacement surgery removes damaged joint surfaces and replaces them with prosthetic components to improve function and quality of life. Case planning includes implant selection, rehab planning, and postoperative follow-up.

Starting package price aligns with Clinido source pricing from 230,000 EGP (about $4,600).

lip_reduction.title: Lip Reduction
lip_reduction.description: Surgical lip-volume reduction to improve facial harmony and proportional contour.
lip_reduction.doctors: Dr. Yasser Badi, Dr. Mohamed Abdallah Tawfik
lip_reduction.hospitals: Specialized Aesthetic Centers in Cairo & Alexandria
lip_reduction.body:
Lip reduction reshapes excess tissue to achieve a balanced lip profile based on facial proportions and patient goals. Treatment planning includes anesthesia review, healing timeline guidance, and follow-up care.

Starting package price aligns with Clinido source pricing from 35,000 EGP (about $700).

dental_implants.title: Dental Implants
dental_implants.description: Artificial root placement for stable and long-term replacement of missing teeth.
dental_implants.doctors: Dr. John Elia, Dr. Ahmed Saeed
dental_implants.hospitals: Dental Express Center, Wonders Dentistry Center
dental_implants.body:
Dental implants place biocompatible fixtures in the jawbone to replace missing teeth with durable support. Planning includes imaging, bone assessment, staged placement, and prosthetic fitting.

Starting package price aligns with Clinido source pricing from 5,000 EGP (about $100).

dental_crowns_bridges.title: Dental Crowns and Bridges
dental_crowns_bridges.description: Restorative solutions for damaged or missing teeth with durable esthetic materials.
dental_crowns_bridges.doctors: Dr. John Elia, Dr. Ahmed Saeed
dental_crowns_bridges.hospitals: Dental Express Center, Wonders Dentistry Center
dental_crowns_bridges.techniques: Crowns, Fixed Bridges, Digital Smile Design
dental_crowns_bridges.body:
Crowns and bridges restore chewing function and appearance by covering damaged teeth or spanning gaps from missing teeth. Material and design are selected based on bite pattern, durability, and esthetic goals.

Starting package price aligns with Clinido source pricing from 2,000 EGP (about $40).

orthodontic_treatment.title: Orthodontic Treatment
orthodontic_treatment.description: Fixed and removable braces to align teeth and improve jaw function.
orthodontic_treatment.doctors: Dr. John Elia, Dr. Ahmed Saeed
orthodontic_treatment.hospitals: Dental Express Center, Wonders Dentistry Center
orthodontic_treatment.techniques: Fixed Braces and Clear Aligner Pathways
orthodontic_treatment.body:
Orthodontic treatment corrects bite and alignment using braces or aligners based on case complexity and treatment goals. Plans are monitored through periodic adjustments and staged progress checks.

Starting package price aligns with Clinido source pricing from 30,000 EGP (about $600).

autism.title: Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) Care
autism.description: Multidisciplinary autism assessment and therapy planning with child psychiatry, behavioral, and speech support.
autism.doctors: Dr. Nasser Loza, Dr. Mohamed Hossam Eldin
autism.hospitals: Specialized child neurodevelopment and mental health centers in Cairo
autism.techniques: ADOS-informed assessment, ABA planning, speech therapy, occupational therapy, parent coaching
autism.success_rate: Early intervention pathways with measurable developmental goals
autism.body:
Autism care works best when diagnosis, behavior plans, speech-language support, and caregiver training are coordinated in one pathway. We help families gather developmental history, reports, and school feedback before travel so the first consultation is clinically focused.

Based on current Egypt market references, initial autism pathway costs often start around 15,000 EGP (about $300) for structured assessment and early-session planning, while comprehensive programs vary by weekly intensity. One-to-one ABA schedules are commonly planned at 10-40 hours per week, with separate pricing for speech and occupational therapy.

Amanak coordinates case review, doctor matching, treatment scheduling, and follow-up milestones so families can track progress with clear goals and transparent cost planning.

chest.title: Chest & Pulmonology Care
chest.description: Diagnosis and management of asthma, COPD, pneumonia, sleep apnea, and complex chest disorders by Egypt's senior pulmonologists.
chest.hospitals: Cairo University Hospital, Ain Shams Specialised Hospital, Cleopatra Hospital
chest.techniques: Flexible Bronchoscopy, EBUS, Polysomnography, Pulmonary Function Testing, Non-Invasive Ventilation
chest.body:
Chest disease care in Egypt covers the full spectrum from chronic conditions like asthma and COPD to acute interventions such as bronchoscopy and management of advanced respiratory failure.

Our partner pulmonologists are senior consultants from Cairo and Ain Shams university hospitals with decades of experience in interventional bronchoscopy, sleep medicine, and pulmonary rehabilitation.

We coordinate the full pathway: pre-arrival imaging review, inpatient or outpatient scheduling, and structured follow-up after you return home.

thoracic_surgery.title: Thoracic Surgery
thoracic_surgery.description: Lung resection, mediastinal tumor removal, and minimally invasive thoracoscopic procedures performed by Egypt's senior thoracic surgeons.
thoracic_surgery.hospitals: National Cancer Institute, Ain Shams Cardiothoracic Centre, Dar Al Fouad
thoracic_surgery.techniques: VATS Lobectomy, Mediastinal Tumor Resection, Pleurectomy, Tracheal Surgery, Pectus Repair
thoracic_surgery.success_rate: Under 2% major complication rate on elective VATS resections
thoracic_surgery.body:
Thoracic surgery in Egypt now routinely uses Video-Assisted Thoracoscopic Surgery (VATS) for lung lobectomies, pleural disease, and mediastinal masses, drastically reducing recovery times.

Our surgical partners come from established cardiothoracic units with experience across hundreds of major resections per year and structured oncology multidisciplinary review.

We coordinate pre-operative imaging review, anesthesia clearance, ICU planning, and post-discharge follow-up.

cardiac_surgery.title: Cardiac Surgery — Open Heart & Valves
cardiac_surgery.description: Coronary bypass, valve replacement and repair, and adult congenital procedures by Egypt's most established cardiac surgeons.
cardiac_surgery.hospitals: Magrabi Cardiac Centre, Aswan Heart Centre, Dar Al Fouad, Cairo University Heart Hospital
cardiac_surgery.techniques: CABG (On-Pump & Off-Pump), Valve Repair & Replacement, Aortic Surgery, Adult Congenital Repair
cardiac_surgery.success_rate: Mortality under 2% for isolated CABG at high-volume partner centres
cardiac_surgery.body:
Egypt's cardiac surgery centres perform thousands of bypass, valve, and combined procedures each year, with on-pump and increasingly off-pump techniques available.

Our partner surgeons hold decades of operative experience and lead training programs at Cairo and Ain Shams universities, with established outcome data comparable to leading European centres at a fraction of the cost.

We assist with pre-op cardiology workup, ICU bed coordination, and structured cardiac rehab after discharge.

neurosurgery.title: Neurosurgery — Brain & Spine
neurosurgery.description: Brain tumor removal, vascular neurosurgery, complex spine reconstruction and minimally invasive procedures by senior neurosurgical teams.
neurosurgery.hospitals: Cairo University Kasr Al Aini, Ain Shams Specialised, Dar Al Fouad
neurosurgery.techniques: Microsurgery, Neuronavigation, Awake Craniotomy, Endoscopic Skull Base, Minimally Invasive Spine
neurosurgery.success_rate: Outcomes benchmarked against international neurosurgical registries
neurosurgery.body:
Egypt's neurosurgical centres handle the full spectrum of cranial and spinal pathology, including brain tumors, aneurysm clipping, AVM resection, and complex deformity correction.

Our partner surgeons are professors at Cairo and Ain Shams universities and operate in centres equipped with neuronavigation, intra-operative monitoring and high-field MRI.

We coordinate imaging review, neuro-anaesthesia clearance, ICU planning, and structured rehabilitation pathways.

general_surgery.title: General Surgery
general_surgery.description: Abdominal, hernia, colorectal and laparoscopic surgery by senior consultants in established Cairo and Alexandria hospitals.
general_surgery.hospitals: Cairo University Hospital, As-Salam International, Cleopatra Hospital
general_surgery.techniques: Laparoscopic Cholecystectomy, Hernia Mesh Repair, Colorectal Resection, Anal/Pilonidal Surgery, Emergency Laparotomy
general_surgery.success_rate: Length of stay and complication rates aligned with European benchmarks
general_surgery.body:
General surgery in Egypt covers laparoscopic cholecystectomy, hernia repair, colorectal procedures and emergency abdominal surgery, with most centres operating to international laparoscopic standards.

Our partner surgeons hold consultant or professor positions and operate in JCI-recognised facilities with full anaesthesia and ICU support.

We coordinate pre-operative imaging and labs, surgical scheduling, and structured discharge with follow-up plans.

oncosurgery.title: Surgical Oncology
oncosurgery.description: Curative cancer surgery for breast, GI, hepatobiliary and head & neck tumors with multidisciplinary tumor board review.
oncosurgery.hospitals: National Cancer Institute, Children's Cancer Hospital 57357, Baheya Foundation
oncosurgery.techniques: Breast Conservation, Whipple Procedure, Hepatic Resection, Sarcoma Surgery, Head & Neck Reconstruction
oncosurgery.success_rate: 5-year outcomes published and peer-reviewed for major resections
oncosurgery.body:
Surgical oncology in Egypt is delivered through dedicated cancer centres with structured multidisciplinary tumor boards covering medical oncology, radiation, pathology and surgery.

Our partner surgeons work at the National Cancer Institute and Children's Cancer Hospital 57357 — both internationally accredited centres handling thousands of complex resections per year.

We coordinate pre-operative staging, multidisciplinary review, surgery scheduling and adjuvant care planning.

vascular_surgery.title: Vascular Surgery
vascular_surgery.description: Aneurysm repair, peripheral bypass, varicose vein treatment and limb-salvage procedures by Egypt's leading vascular surgeons.
vascular_surgery.hospitals: Cairo University Vascular Unit, Cleopatra Hospital, Dar Al Fouad
vascular_surgery.techniques: EVAR/TEVAR, Peripheral Angioplasty & Stenting, Carotid Endarterectomy, AV Fistula, Varicose Vein Ablation
vascular_surgery.success_rate: Limb salvage rate above 92% in high-risk diabetic referrals
vascular_surgery.body:
Vascular surgery in Egypt covers both open and endovascular procedures — including EVAR for abdominal aneurysms, peripheral angioplasty, and limb salvage in diabetic patients.

Our partner surgeons run dedicated vascular units with hybrid operating theatres and 24/7 interventional radiology support.

We coordinate vascular imaging review, perioperative anaesthesia, and structured follow-up with duplex surveillance.

internal_medicine.title: Internal Medicine — Geriatrics, Gastroenterology & Endoscopy
internal_medicine.description: Comprehensive internal medicine review, gastrointestinal endoscopy, and geriatric care by senior internists across Cairo.
internal_medicine.hospitals: Cairo University Hospital, Ain Shams Specialised, As-Salam International
internal_medicine.techniques: Gastroscopy, Colonoscopy, ERCP, EUS, Comprehensive Geriatric Assessment
internal_medicine.success_rate: Diagnostic yield aligned with international gastroenterology benchmarks
internal_medicine.body:
Internal medicine partners cover geriatric assessments, gastrointestinal endoscopy (gastroscopy, colonoscopy, ERCP) and management of complex chronic disease.

We match you with a consultant whose sub-specialty fits your case — geriatric, gastroenterology, or general internal medicine — and coordinate same-week diagnostic workup.

Reports are translated to your home physician for continuity of care after you return.

pediatric_orthopedics.title: Pediatric Orthopedic Surgery
pediatric_orthopedics.description: Specialised orthopedic care for children — congenital deformities, growth-plate injuries, and pediatric trauma — by dedicated pediatric orthopedic surgeons.
pediatric_orthopedics.hospitals: Children's Cancer Hospital 57357, Abu El-Reesh Pediatric Hospital, As-Salam International
pediatric_orthopedics.techniques: DDH Reduction, Clubfoot (Ponseti), Growth Modulation, Pediatric Deformity Correction, Limb Reconstruction
pediatric_orthopedics.success_rate: Long-term outcomes tracked through dedicated pediatric ortho registries
pediatric_orthopedics.body:
Pediatric orthopedic care addresses congenital conditions like clubfoot and DDH, growth-plate fractures, and complex deformity correction in growing skeletons.

Our partner surgeons are dedicated pediatric orthopedists with specialised fellowship training and child-friendly recovery pathways.

We coordinate child-appropriate imaging, anaesthesia consultation, and family-centred follow-up.

ankle_surgery.title: Foot & Ankle Surgery
ankle_surgery.description: Ankle arthroscopy, fusion, ligament reconstruction and complex foot reconstruction by sub-specialised foot & ankle surgeons.
ankle_surgery.hospitals: As-Salam International, Cleopatra Hospital, Dar Al Fouad
ankle_surgery.techniques: Ankle Arthroscopy, Ankle Fusion, Total Ankle Replacement, Hallux Valgus Correction, Ligament Reconstruction
ankle_surgery.success_rate: High patient-reported satisfaction on ankle arthroscopy and Hallux Valgus repair
ankle_surgery.body:
Foot and ankle care in Egypt is delivered by sub-specialised orthopedic surgeons handling sports injuries, post-traumatic deformities, hallux valgus, and ankle fusion or replacement.

Our partner surgeons combine arthroscopic and open techniques and integrate physiotherapy from week one of recovery.

We coordinate weight-bearing imaging review, surgical scheduling and structured rehab plans.

deformities_revision.title: Bone Deformity Correction & Revision Surgery
deformities_revision.description: Complex deformity correction and revision arthroplasty for previously failed orthopedic procedures.
deformities_revision.hospitals: As-Salam International, Cleopatra Hospital, Dar Al Fouad
deformities_revision.techniques: Revision Hip & Knee Arthroplasty, Ilizarov Frame, Axial Deformity Correction, Custom Mega-Prosthesis, Two-Stage Revision for Infection
deformities_revision.success_rate: Revision arthroplasty outcomes benchmarked against international registries
deformities_revision.body:
Revision orthopedic surgery in Egypt addresses cases that need re-do hip and knee arthroplasty, complex axial deformities, malunion or non-union of long bones, and post-infection reconstruction.

Our partner surgeons are sub-specialised in revision arthroplasty and complex deformity, with access to custom implants and modular revision systems.

We coordinate detailed pre-op imaging review, infection workup where relevant, and a realistic recovery timeline given case complexity.

hero.title: Reclaim your wellbeing in Egypt with integrated care
hero.subtitle: From around the world to Egypt’s leading hospitals. Amanak holds hospitals, specialists, accommodation, and transport under one accountable team, so recovery stays safe and your budget is clear before you travel.
hero.imageAlt: Aerial view of the Nile River and Cairo skyline

whyEgypt.title: Why choose Egypt, and why Amanak?
whyEgypt.lead: Egypt offers world-class medical expertise at exceptional value. Amanak is your trusted partner, managing every detail across top-tier hospitals and doctors, comfortable stays, and safe transport, with all costs transparent and fixed upfront.
whyEgypt.bullet1: Elite surgeons and consultants in modern hospitals achieving world-class results, at carefully planned costs that suit families in our region.
whyEgypt.bullet2Title: The Amanak Team by Your Side
whyEgypt.bullet2: We are a licensed Egyptian company and a member of the Travel Agents Association (ETAA). Our team accompanies you every step of the way, from record review to your safe return.
whyEgypt.bullet3: We handle scheduling, physician selection, and arranging accommodation and transfers. Having one accountable partner ensures the highest standards of care.
whyEgypt.bullet4: Treatment, stay, and transport costs are determined upfront. You receive a clear plan before traveling, so you can make your family decision with confidence.

accreditedHospitals.title: Internationally Accredited Care in Egypt
accreditedHospitals.lead: We partner with hospitals that meet rigorous global and national standards, ensuring your safety and the highest quality of medical service.
accreditedHospitals.gaharBody: The General Authority for Healthcare Accreditation and Regulation (GAHAR) is Egypt's official body. Its standards are ISQua-accredited, matching the highest global benchmarks for patient safety and clinical excellence.
accreditedHospitals.jciBody: Joint Commission International (JCI) is the world's leader in healthcare accreditation. JCI-accredited hospitals in Egypt demonstrate a commitment to the same safety standards found in the top medical centers in the US and Europe.
accreditedHospitals.tableCaption: A selection of our accredited hospital partners
accreditedHospitals.officialSiteAria: Official website for {hospital}, opens in a new tab

accommodation.sealTitle: Your Licensed Partner for a Safe and Comfortable Stay
accommodation.sealBody: Amanak is an official member of the ETAA, ensuring organized logistics in carefully selected accommodations near major medical centers. We offer special rates for long stays and a familiar family atmosphere that meets all your needs.
accommodation.verifyLinkText: Verify membership on the official portal
accommodation.staysTitle: Accommodation Focused on Your Comfort and Recovery
accommodation.staysLead: We understand that our patients from the region prefer traveling with their families, so we prioritize providing accommodation options that suit companions and offer an atmosphere for healing and family support, at preferential rates for Amanak patients.

listing1.title: Fairmont Nile City - Cairo
listing1.features: Luxury Suite • Nile View • Near Major Medical Centers

listing2.title: Modern Suite - Heliopolis
listing2.features: 2 Bedrooms • Near Cleopatra Hospital • Family Friendly

listing3.title: Premium Stay - 6th of October
listing3.features: 3 Bedrooms • Near Dar Al Fouad • Quiet Environment

transportationTeaser.title: Safe and reliable transport throughout your journey
transportationTeaser.lead: We coordinate with licensed partners to ensure your movement between the airport, hospital, and stay is comfortable, secure, and always on time.
transportationTeaser.jtnyBlurb: Experience silent and smooth recovery on the road with our fully electric, Ministry-licensed partners.
transportationTeaser.jtnyImageAlt: Modern electric vehicle for quiet transport
transportationTeaser.arrwBlurb: Reliable ride-hailing with vetted drivers and transparent upfront pricing for all your city trips.
transportationTeaser.privateBlurb: Dedicated VIP reception and specialized vehicles tailored for patient comfort and medical needs.
transportationTeaser.privateImageAlt: Spacious private vehicle for comfortable medical transport

ivf.title: IVF & Fertility Treatments
ivf.description: Comprehensive fertility evaluation, IVF lab coordination, and clear step-by-step treatment plans.

dental.title: Dental Implants & Veneers
dental.description: Digital imaging and specialist planning for implant cases and aesthetic veneer smile design.

eyeSurgery.title: LASIK & Eye Surgery
eyeSurgery.description: Advanced refractive and ophthalmic procedures with pre-op screening and structured post-op checks.

bariatric.title: Bariatric Surgery
bariatric.description: Weight-loss surgery programs combining surgical expertise, nutrition planning, and recovery follow-up.

cosmetic.title: Cosmetic Surgery
cosmetic.description: Personalized aesthetic surgery plans with transparent expectations, safety-first protocols, and recovery support.

jointReplacement.title: Joint Replacements
jointReplacement.description: Hip and knee replacement pathways with experienced orthopedic teams and rehabilitation-focused outcomes.

topDoctorsReels.title: Leading doctors in Egypt
topDoctorsReels.lead: Egypt is home to surgeons and consultants who routinely manage complex cases with outcomes that compare well across the region. Scroll these Instagram highlights: from patient stories and clinical excellence at centres we trust for your Amanak journey.

painPoints.title: Goodbye to medical travel headaches: a smooth journey with Amanak
painPoints.row1s: Defined packages covering everything, from airport to hospital.
painPoints.row2s: We coordinate your appointments with hospitals and labs before you arrive, so you can start treatment immediately.
painPoints.row3p: Concerns about service quality or reliability
painPoints.row3s: We are your official and legal partner in Egypt, ensuring your rights and the highest standards of quality.
painPoints.row4s: We provide comfortable accommodation and a dedicated private transport throughout your stay.

process.title: Your journey with us in 4 simple steps
process.step1: Upload your medical records in a secure environment that ensures your privacy.
process.step2: Our medical team carefully reviews your case and presents it to the specialist physician.
process.step3: Select from our diverse packages (Economy, VIP, Integrated) to suit your needs.
process.step4: We receive you from the airport and begin the healing journey with continuous follow-up at every step.

trust.stats: More than 500 patients from the region have trusted us with their medical journey.

1.quote: "I was worried about the arrangements for treatment in Egypt, but with Amanak, every detail was clear and costs were defined before my travel."

2.quote: "The medical team in Egypt is world-class. Amanak coordinated everything from my arrival to the final check-up. I felt at home."

3.quote: "Professionalism and transparency are what define Amanak. The diabetic foot care I received saved my limb when others said it was impossible."

finalCta.title: Don’t leave health to chance.
finalCta.body: Register and upload your records; your Amanak medical advisor will reach out within 24 hours to finalize details.

estimate.title: Trip estimator
estimate.comingSoonBody: The pricing and itinerary tool is on the way. Request a consultation and we will help you plan your trip in the meantime.

consultationBooking.title: Book your free consultation call
consultationBooking.lead: Pick a date and time that suit you. Add your contact details and we will call you to discuss your medical journey to Egypt.
consultationBooking.localTimeNote: Times are shown in your local time zone.
consultationBooking.noSlotsDay: No times on this day. Please choose another date.

errors.slotUnavailable: This time is no longer available. Please choose another slot.

partners.metaDescription: Partner with Amanak as a hospital, clinic, physician group, hotel, or transport provider. One coordinated medical travel network for patients coming to Egypt.
partners.heroLead: Join Egypt’s medical travel ecosystem: accredited care, licensed coordination, and a single accountable team connecting international patients with hospitals, stays, and safe ground transport.
partners.why1: Access a pipeline of patients from the region seeking structured care in Egypt, with clear expectations and documented pathways.
partners.why2: Work with a licensed Egyptian travel operator (ETAA member) that aligns logistics, accommodation, and transfers with clinical schedules.
partners.why3: Reduce fragmentation: one partner coordinates scheduling, multilingual communication, and follow-up touchpoints where your team leads clinically.
partners.why4: Strengthen trust: we emphasize accredited hospitals, full cost transparency, and accommodation and transport partners chosen for safety and reliability.

hospital.title: Hospitals
hospital.body: International patient desks and complex specialties.

doctor.title: Specialists
doctor.body: Expert consultants for oncology, orthopedics, and IVF.

transport.title: Logistics
transport.body: Licensed airport transfers and ground transport.

step1.title: Introductory call
step1.body: We learn your services, service area, and compliance expectations, and we share how Amanak routes patients and companions.

step2.title: Agreement & onboarding
step2.body: We align on hand-offs, SLAs for response times, and how bookings and escalations flow between your team and ours.

step3.title: Referrals & operations
step3.body: Live coordination: scheduled referrals, logistics tied to clinical milestones, and continuous improvement from real case feedback.

partners.ctaHint: Tell us your organization type, location, and how you’d like to collaborate. We’ll respond with next steps.
partners.heroImageAlt: Professional team collaborating in a modern office environment
partners.teamBody: Our team is formed from professionals who have served in the healthcare system for over 10 years, working in close cooperation with experts from the IT and hospitality sectors for just as long. This unique synergy allows us to provide a seamless, safe, and comfortable medical journey for every patient.
partners.teamImageAlt: A professional team of healthcare and technology experts collaborating
partners.healthcareProvidersLead: We collaborate with Egypt's most trusted diagnostic centers to provide accurate results and seamless coordination for our patients.
partners.pharmacyPartnersLead: We partner with Egypt's largest pharmacy chains to ensure 24/7 availability of medications and professional pharmaceutical care for our patients.
partners.accommodationLead: From global booking platforms to specialized local providers, we help you find the perfect stay for your recovery and your family.

platforms.title: Global Platforms & Local Apps
platforms.body: We guide you through the best options on booking.com, airbnb, and local Egyptian apps like rentelly and maat stays for flexible, vetted stays.

providers.title: Specialized Stay Providers
providers.body: Direct access to recovery-focused hospitality groups like xuru stays, birdnest, kennah hospitality, and brassbell hospitality group, offering serviced apartments tailored for medical travelers.

partners.otherPartnersLead: We partner with Egypt’s leading licensed transport providers to ensure your journey is as smooth as your recovery. From jtny silent electric fleet for post-op calm to arrw transparent city travel and our private VIP medical escorts, every leg of your trip is managed for safety and reliability.

transportation.jtnyTagline: Premium, silent recovery on the road
transportation.jtnyWhat: Egypt’s first officially licensed electric ride-hailing app: a luxury fleet of 100 fully electric vehicles licensed by the Ministry of Transport, ideal when calm matters right after a procedure.
transportation.jtnyB1: Silent transport: no engine noise or vibration, easier on patients traveling soon after surgery or those sensitive to sound during recovery.
transportation.jtnyB2: In-cabin cameras cover the full trip, reassuring for families in Iraq and Libya following a loved one in an unfamiliar city.
transportation.jtnyB3: Handpicked drivers trained to demanding service standards, not anonymous street hail.
transportation.jtnyB4: Intercity luxury service between Cairo and Alexandria in new, safety-focused vehicles when your care plan spans both cities.
transportation.jtnyImageAlt: Calm, modern vehicle suggesting quiet electric transport
transportation.arrwWhat: A locally developed, licensed Egyptian ride-hailing platform built for the domestic market, with security, fair upfront pricing, and reliability for international patients.
transportation.arrwB1: Competitive, upfront rates with no hidden fees, critical when you are managing a strict medical budget abroad.
transportation.arrwB2: Vetted drivers, live trip tracking, and optional dashcam service for added security during the ride.
transportation.arrwB3: Pay with cash, card, or in-app wallet, flexible when you are still settling local payment options.
transportation.privateLead: Licensed apps cover day-to-day movement; our private partners handle clinical-grade needs and border-to-bed hand-offs.
transportation.privateAirport: Especially valuable for Iraqi travelers: representatives can meet patients before passport control to assist with security approvals and entry formalities, so the first hour in Egypt feels guided, not chaotic.
transportation.privateVehicle: Post-operative transfers use vehicles with extra legroom and reclining seats when needed, to your hotel or onward routing such as the Salloum border when your care plan requires it.
transportation.private247: Dedicated drivers for hospital visits, pharmacy runs, labs, and imaging, door-to-door, on your schedule, not a generic tour clock.
transportation.privateClosing: Apps plus private partners mean every leg from curbside to clinic is chosen for safety, transparency, and the comfort your case demands.
transportation.privateImageAltMeet: Premium chauffeur fleet of luxury sedans for private transportation
transportation.privateImageAltVehicle: Spacious and comfortable vehicle for patient transfer
transportation.privateImageCaption: We choose the right vehicle for your health condition, ensuring your total comfort between the hotel and the hospital.

contact.metaDescription: Reach the Amanak team with questions about medical travel to Egypt, hospitals, treatments, or planning your care. Send a message or book a free consultation call.
contact.title: Contact us
contact.lead: Tell us what you need and we will respond as soon as possible.
contact.partnerLead: You’re reaching out about a partnership. Please include your organization name, your role, city or region, and how you’d like to work with Amanak (e.g. hospital, clinic, hotel, transport).
contact.bookingLead: Choose a date and time, then add your details. We’ll call you to discuss your medical journey to Egypt.

inquiry.title: Consultation request
inquiry.lead: Share your details and our team will contact you.

errors.minMessage: Please add a bit more detail (10+ characters)

footer.tagline: Amanak: your partner for medical travel to Egypt.
footer.supervisionMinistryAlt: Logo of the Egyptian Ministry of Health and Population
footer.supervisionCouncilAlt: Logo of the National Council for Health Tourism

about.metaDescription: Learn about Amanak, our mission, and how we coordinate international patients across the region.
about.reachBody: With dedicated offices in Libya, Iraq, and Jordan, Amanak has successfully helped international patients access top-tier treatments in Jordan, Turkey, Dubai, Egypt, and Europe. We understand the regional needs and bridge the distance between you and the best medical care.
about.reachImageAlt: Global map showing Amanak's international connectivity
about.teamLead: Our leadership brings together clinical travel coordination, commercial growth, and trusted partnerships across the region.

teamMembers.name: Raed Youssef

portal.uploadModalDescription: Choose the document type and select a file from your device.
portal.uploadErrorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
portal.uploadErrorFile: Please choose a file to upload.
portal.missingRequiredTitle: {count, plural, one {# required document still missing} other {# required documents still missing}}

crm.crmTodayHint: Appointments scheduled for today and open tasks due today or overdue, by teammate.
crm.crmTodayGlobalEmpty: Nothing is scheduled or due today across the team.
crm.activityLogDescription: Chronological status changes, who acted, and notes.
crm.apptEmptyAll: No appointments scheduled for this lead yet.
crm.apptModalDescription: Schedule a treatment visit, online meeting, or team consultation for this lead.
crm.apptLocationPlaceholder: e.g. Cairo — ward or hospital name
crm.apptCreatesTaskHint: Saves a consultation slot and creates a task for your team with the same due time.
crm.apptErrorRequiredFields: Please fill in all required fields.
crm.taskPinnedAria: Open task — kept at the top of the list
crm.addTaskDescription: Add a new task to track follow-ups for this lead.
crm.noActiveTasks: No active tasks at the moment.
crm.taskDetailDescription: Update due date, assignee, and required information, then mark complete.
crm.taskDetailNotFoundDescription: This task may have been removed or the link is outdated.
crm.taskCompleteNoteDescription: This step requires a note before the lead status can advance.
crm.taskEmpty: No tasks yet. Add one to track follow-ups for this lead.
crm.taskLoginHint: Sign in to add or change tasks.
crm.convEmptyAll: No conversations recorded for this lead yet.
crm.convComposeDescription: Log a call or record WhatsApp, SMS, or email sent to this lead.
crm.convComposeAppCallComingSoonBody: Calling patients from the app will be available in a future release. Use “Log call” to record a call you made outside the app.
crm.convComposeTpl_docs_checklist_wa: Hi {name}, quick reminder: we still need a few documents for your trip. Reply here if you have questions.
crm.convComposeTpl_docs_checklist_emailBody:
Hello {name},

This is a reminder about the documents we still need to move forward with your medical travel plans. If anything is unclear, reply to this email.

Best,
Amanak team
crm.convComposeTpl_docs_checklist_sms: Amanak: Hi {name}, reminder — we still need some documents for your trip. Check your email or reply here. Thanks.
crm.convComposeTpl_appointment_reminder_wa: Hi {name}, friendly reminder about your upcoming consultation with us. Let us know if you need to reschedule.
crm.convComposeTpl_appointment_reminder_emai:
Hello {name},

This is a reminder about your upcoming consultation. If you need to change the time, reply to this email and we will help.

Best,
Amanak team
crm.convComposeTpl_appointment_reminder_sms: Amanak: Hi {name}, reminder — your consultation is coming up. Reply if you need to reschedule.
crm.convComposeTpl_payment_followup_wa: Hi {name}, following up on payment for your package. Let us know if you need the payment link again.
crm.convComposeTpl_payment_followup_emailBod:
Hello {name},

We are following up on payment for your selected package. If you need a secure payment link or have questions, reply to this email.

Best,
Amanak team
crm.convComposeTpl_payment_followup_sms: Amanak: Hi {name}, following up on your package payment. Reply if you need help or a payment link.

crm.convComposeErrorNoPatientEmail: This lead has no email on file. Add an email to the lead before sending.
crm.convComposeErrorNoPatientPhone: This lead has no phone on file. Add a phone number before sending an SMS.

mahmoud_hafez_v1.caption: Prof. Mahmoud Hafez interviewed on Nile TV after winning the Gold Medal at Geneva Inventions for his patient-specific device for knee joint replacement.

mohamed_mohi_eldin_v1.caption: Prof. Mohamed Mohi Eldin leads a transpedicular screws workshop during the 3rd International Congress of Minimally Invasive Neurosurgery (ISMINS 2016) in Cairo.

mohamed_mohi_eldin_v2.caption: Prof. Mehmet Zileli and Prof. Mohamed Mohi Eldin discuss spine surgery on Seahaty TV during the 3rd Middle East Spine Meeting.

mohamed_mokhtar_v1.caption: Prof. Mohamed Mokhtar with Prof. Markus Walther discussing foot and ankle surgery techniques at the Stride Clinic in Cairo.

mohamed_mokhtar_v2.caption: Prof. Mohamed Mokhtar's Foot and Ankle Surgery Clinic announces a visiting specialist collaboration on advanced foot and ankle procedures.

nasef_mohamed_nasef_v2.caption: Dr. Nasef Mohamed Nasef shares an educational reel about foot and ankle treatment from DrNasef Ortho Clinic.

yasser_batrawy_v2.caption: Dr. Yasser Elbatrawy on MBC 1 program Kalam Nawa3em discussing bone lengthening surgery and indications.

yasser_batrawy_v3.caption: Dr. Yasser Elbatrawy explains limb lengthening surgery (جراحة إطالة العظام) and patient outcomes.

yasser_sadek_v3.caption: Dr. Yasser Sadek discusses the Cardio Alex cardiology conference and key interventional updates.

ayman_mortada_v1.caption: Dr. Ayman Mortada presents tips and tricks in CRT (cardiac resynchronization therapy) implantation.

nabil_farag_v1.caption: Prof. Nabil Farag with Prof. Gamal Fahim on coronary intervention in patients with chronic kidney disease (CKD).

tarek_helmy_v1.caption: Dr. Tarek Helmy at CVI2018: Minimizing left ventricular outflow tract obstruction in transcatheter mitral valve replacement.

hesham_elghazaly_v3.caption: Dr. Hesham El Ghazaly reviews immunotherapy and targeted treatments in breast cancer at the 10th BGICC.

hatem_azim_v1.caption: Dr. Hatem Azim discusses assisted reproduction and fertility preservation in breast cancer patients on JCO Article Insights.

hatem_azim_v2.caption: Dr. Hatem Azim on fertility preservation and assisted reproductive technologies in breast cancer at SABCS.

osama_alghanam_v2.caption: Dr. Ahmed Osama El Ghannam, neurosurgery consultant, shares his vision and aspirations on the Neurosurgery Center channel.

ahmed_zahran_v1.caption: Dr. Ahmed Zahran, consultant neurosurgeon, shares an educational reel on neurosurgery and spine care.

ahmed_zahran_v2.caption: Dr. Ahmed Zahran teaches Rhoton neuroanatomy series episode 1: Cranial Fossa.

ahmed_zahran_v3.caption: Dr. Ahmed Zahran introduces spine anatomy in his Neurosurgery Made Easy series.

yasser_badi_v3.caption: Defined chin always wins! Dr. Yasser Badi shows how chin contouring can transform your facial profile.

marwan_noureldin_v3.caption: Part 1: Learn how you can relocate body hair with FUE technique by Dr. Marwan Noureldin.

hossam_tahseen_v2.caption: Dr. Hossam Tahseen announces his ISAPS engagement, sharing his global plastic surgery practice and high-definition contouring expertise.

mohamed_elghalban_v1.caption: Dr. Mohamed Elghalban, Total Definer certified plastic surgeon, demonstrates advanced body contouring and high-definition sculpting.

mohamed_mamdouh_v1.caption: Everything about thigh liposuction with Dr. Mohamed Mamdouh: when to do it, why, and how the procedure differs between men and women.

samir_ghoraba_v2.caption: Dr. Samir Ghoraba reviews 1-year results of Deep Tissue Sculpture facial plastic surgery, showcasing long-term natural outcomes.

samir_ghoraba_v3.caption: Make your own story... Story of the Face, Story of Beauty - Dr. Samir Ghoraba on the artistry of facial plastic surgery.

khaled_sami_v1.caption: The Diamond Concept nose job by Dr. Khaled Sami - signature rhinoplasty designed for refined, balanced facial proportions.

khaled_sami_v2.caption: They call it Rhinoplasty. I call it a life-changing procedure - Dr. Khaled Sami on the impact of nose surgery.

khaled_sami_v3.caption: Nose Job with the Diamond Concept by Dr. Khaled Sami - precision rhinoplasty for natural, elegant results.

wael_ghannem_v1.caption: A Beautiful Nose Awaits: rhinoplasty by Dr. Wael Ghannem - precision nose surgery designed for natural, harmonious results.

wael_ghannem_v2.caption: When facial sagging is severe... Dr. Wael Ghanem explains when surgical facelift becomes the right choice.

ashraf_abolfotoh_v1.caption: Dr. Ashraf Abolfotooh Khalil specializes in breast and body plastic surgery, with 20+ years of European-board certified experience.

hossam_abolatta_v1.caption: Tummy tuck with Prof. Hossam Abol Atta, Professor of Plastic Surgery - explanation of abdominoplasty procedure and outcomes.

ahmed_taalab_v1.caption: Know Your Doctor: Dr. Ahmed Taalab, Consultant Plastic Surgeon and Total Definer Master, on his approach to body contouring.
